title: Partial variable assignment leads to incorrect ordering/lack of circular logic detection

features.name: always_comb partial assignment overlapping with continuous assign
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with partial (bit-select) assignments to a variable that also has a continuous assignment to an overlapping slice

features.name: bit-select procedural assignment to variable with high fanin continuous assign
features.description: Code should include a bit-select procedural assignment inside always_comb to a variable where continuous assignments to overlapping slices have high fan-in
